# AI-LAP Architecture

This page uses static image URLs for diagrams, so they render even when Mermaid preview support is unavailable.

## 1) System Architecture

![System Architecture](https://mermaid.)

## 2) WebSocket Sequence

![WebSocket Flow](https://mermaid.)

## 3) BullMQ Sequence

![BullMQ Flow](https://mermaid.)

## 4) Kafka Stream Sequence

![Kafka Flow](https://mermaid.)

## 5) Core Architecture Notes

- Backend handles authenticated REST and real-time coach chat over Socket.IO.
- Next.js handles async inference queueing (`/api/chat`) and dashboard streaming (`/api/scores/stream`).
- Python FastAPI performs inference and stores results asynchronously.
- Kafka path (`python-backend/vasl-db`) is an additional stream-based ingestion and consumer pipeline.
- Redis is used for pub/sub updates and timing telemetry.
